Uses of Interface
com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.json.spec.JsonService

  • Packages that use JsonService 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.client.builder
    Provides classes for building GeminiClient instances.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.client.imp
    Provides implementations for the GeminiClient interface.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.client.spec
    Provides specifications and interfaces for the Gemini client.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.json.builder
    Provides classes for building JsonService instances.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.json.impl
    Provides implementations for the JsonService interface.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.json.spec
    Provides specifications and interfaces for the JSON service.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder
    Provides classes for building resource instances.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl
    Provides implementations for Gemini API resource interfaces.

    • Uses of JsonService in com.enovka.gemini4j.client.builder

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.client.builder with parameters of type JsonService 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      GeminiClientBuilder GeminiClientBuilder.withJsonService​(JsonService jsonService)
      Sets the JSON service to use for serialization and deserialization.

    • Uses of JsonService in com.enovka.gemini4j.client.imp

      Constructors in com.enovka.gemini4j.client.imp with parameters of type JsonService 
      Constructor Description
      GeminiClientImp​(String apiKey, String model, HttpClient httpClient, String baseUrl, JsonService jsonService)
      Constructs a new AbstractGeminiClient with the required API key, model, HTTP client, base URL, and JSON service.

      class  AbstractJsonService

    • Uses of JsonService in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl

      Constructors in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl with parameters of type JsonService 
      Constructor Description
      EmbedResourceImpl​(GeminiClient geminiClient, JsonService jsonService)
      Constructs a new EmbedResourceImpl with the required GeminiClient and JsonService.
